prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为17965→17826→15785→19446→22223，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024年江西省高考改革（理科→物理类）后位次明显后移，2025年基准约22 223名；该校在江西省招生计划持续扩增：2021年116人、2022年115人、2023年115人、2024年131人、2025年170人，2026年计划201人，较2025年扩招约1 8.2%，扩招幅度较大，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第113名持续上升至2026年第97名，排名稳步提升，学校综合 实力和认可度有所增强；2022年高考周期内曾因学校管理争议出现偏负面舆情（郑强书记管理受批评），但2026年周期内无显著声誉事件；抖音热度排名第63位 （一般），CUBA篮球赛表现突出有一定曝光，整体关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估中化学工程与技术为A-，是该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的化学工程与 工艺等直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、电气、自动化等工科专业社会热度持续较高；江西省2026年物理类考生约26.8万人，较2025年 略有增加，竞争基数扩大；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，属中西部非热门报考地域，对江西省考生吸引力相对有限；该校在江西省招生占比近年持续提升，2025年约占总招生计划的3.3%。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次22223名、2026年大幅扩招约18.2%（缓解竞争）、软科排名持续上升 （增强吸引力）、江西省考生小幅增加等因素，在，考虑到学校排名上升带来的正面效应适当回调，预测最低位次约24605名，区间24105–25 105名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化（试验班）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 集成电路设计与集成系统（试验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 通信工程
- 人工智能
- 数据科学与大数据技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化学工程与工艺
- 材料科学与工程
- 土木工程
- 安全工程
- 纺织工程。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约24605名，区间24105–25105名。位次在区间下限（24105名）以内可重点冲刺一档电气/计算机等热门专业；位次在区间中段（约24600名附近）建议以二档工科专业为 主、一档为辅；位次在区间上限（25105名）附近建议以三档专业保底，同时可关注化学工程与工艺（学校唯一A-学科，学科实力最强）。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 17965 → 17826 → 15785 → 19446 → 22223, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. After the 2024 Jiangxi college entrance exam reform (from Science to Physics Category), rankings significantly shifted backward, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 22,223. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi has been continuously expanding: 116 in 2021, 115 in 2022, 115 in 2023, 131 in 2024, 170 in 2025, and a planned 201 in 2026, an increase of about 18.2% compared to 2025. The expansion is substantial, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition. During the 2022 exam cycle, there was some negative public opinion due to management controversies (criticism of Secretary Zheng Qiang's management), but no significant reputation events occurred in the 2026 cycle. Its Douyin popularity ranks 63rd (average), with notable exposure from CUBA basketball performance, maintaining overall stable attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to majors like Chemical Engineering and Process, attracting some applicants to related programs.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Automation continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, Jiangxi has approximately 268,000 Physics Category examinees, a slight increase from 2025, expanding the competition base. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi Province, a non-popular application region in central and western China, with relatively limited appeal to Jiangxi examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi has been increasing in recent years, accounting for about 3.3% of the total enrollment plan in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 22,223, a significant 18.2% enrollment expansion in 2026 (easing competition), a continuously rising Soft Science ranking (enhancing appeal), and a slight increase in Jiangxi examinees, and factoring in the positive effect of the university's ranking rise for appropriate adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24,605, with a range of 24,105–25,105.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Experimental Class)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integration System (Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Communication Engineering
- Artificial Intelligence
- Data Science and Big Data Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical Engineering and Process
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Civil Engineering
- Safety Engineering
- Textile Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 24,605, range 24,105–25,105. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (24,105) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical/Computer Science; those around the middle of the range (about 24,600) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 engineering majors with Tier 1 as supplementary; those near the upper limit (25,105) should consider Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to Chemical Engineering and Process (the university's only A- discipline, with the strongest academic strength).
